---
title: "Team"
subtitle: "Faculty, students, research associates, and visitors of the Social Networks Group – UC"
---

## Core Faculty

::: {.snuc-people}
<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar photo"><img src="img/team/espinosa-rada.jpg" alt="Alejandro Espinosa-Rada"></div>
### Alejandro Espinosa-Rada
<div class="role">Assistant Professor · Institute of Sociology, PUC</div>
<div class="bio">PhD in Sociology, University of Manchester (Mitchell Centre for Social Network Analysis); previously postdoctoral researcher and lecturer at ETH Zürich's Social Networks Lab. Research: sociology of social networks, group dynamics, sociology of science and knowledge, and statistical models for social networks. Author and maintainer of [netmem](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/netmem/index.html).</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar photo"><img src="img/team/arias.jpg" alt="Karina Arias"></div>
### Karina Arias
<div class="role">Associate Professor · School of Government, PUC</div>
<div class="bio">PhD in Public Administration and Policy, Florida State University. Research: metropolitan governance, inter-municipal cooperation, and network analysis applied to public administration. Board member, Chilean Society for Social Network Science (CHISOCNET).</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar photo"><img src="img/team/luengo.jpg" alt="Daniela Luengo"></div>
### Daniela Luengo
<div class="role">Assistant Professor · College UC & Faculty of Education, PUC</div>
<div class="bio">PhD in Educational Policy, University of Rochester. Research combines the economics of education, quasi-experimental methods, and network analysis to study educational-labor trajectories, equity and inclusion, and the adoption of innovations in school systems.</div>
</div>
:::

## Researchers

::: {.snuc-people}
<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">MB</div>
### María G. Barrera
<div class="role">PhD · Agronomy and Natural Systems, PUC</div>
</div>
:::

## Doctoral Students

::: {.snuc-people}
<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">RZ</div>
### Raúl Zuleta
<div class="role">PhD Candidate · Anthropology, PUC</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">LH</div>
### Liliana Hurtado
<div class="role">PhD Candidate · Communications, PUC</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">VR</div>
### Valquiria Ramos
<div class="role">PhD Candidate · Communications, PUC</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">DT</div>
### Daniel Toro
<div class="role">PhD Candidate · Industrial & Systems Engineering, Universidad de Chile</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">DC</div>
### Diego Caro
<div class="role">PhD Candidate · Sociology, University of Manchester</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">RC</div>
### Roberto Cantillán
<div class="role">PhD Candidate · Sociology, PUC</div>
</div>
:::

## Master's Students & Research Assistants

::: {.snuc-people}
<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">LV</div>
### Lorenzo Vives
<div class="role">MA, Sociology, PUC</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">AD</div>
### Alberto Durán
<div class="role">MA Candidate · Sociology, PUC</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">TP</div>
### Trajan Pirkovic
<div class="role">MA Candidate · Sociology, PUC</div>
</div>
:::

## Research Associates

External collaborators who hold a continuing affiliation with the group.

::: {.snuc-people}
<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">FO</div>
### Francisca Ortiz
<div class="role">Research Associate</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">DP</div>
### Diego Palacios
<div class="role">Research Associate</div>
</div>
:::

<!-- TODO: add home institutions for Francisca Ortiz and Diego Palacios, and any further research associates. -->

## Visitors & Exchanges

::: {.snuc-table}
| Name | Home institution | Visit period |
|---|---|---|
| Matías Montero | University of Oxford | April – October |
| Daniel Trujillo Martins Fontes | Universidade de São Paulo | July – August |
| Pavel Krivitsky | University of New South Wales | January |
:::

## Internship

::: {.snuc-table}
| Name | Program | Home institution | Period |
|---|---|---|---|
| Paloma Rojas | Design | Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile | April – September |
:::
